message:
🐛 Fix TextEditingController disposed during dialog animation (#103)

All 5 dialog methods were calling controller.dispose() immediately after
showDialog returned, while Flutter was still animating the dialog exit
and the TextFormField still referenced the controller.

Use WidgetsBinding.addPostFrameCallback to defer disposal until after
the current frame completes.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
